comment.body:
the market opened at the 68.2% reversion line. not far from the local pin range. 
speed is net negative, less bet on upside, more about protecting the downside. but yeah, path of the least resistance is up.
what bet would you place, and where would you place your stop-loss? or wait until it shows a move?
like break of 6997 with increased selling volume, declining RSI ... all compared to previous days... looking at it in multiple timeframes to get a context for volume
